category_sources: source_facts.description says video processing framework; vapoursynth.com documentation describes VapourSynth functions, scripting, plugins, and video/audio processing APIs.
display_name_sources: vapoursynth.com documentation and the official GitHub repository use the project name VapourSynth.
docs_sources: vapoursynth.com/doc is the official VapourSynth documentation site with installation, getting started, Python reference, function reference, and C API reference.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated as https://github.com/vapoursynth/vapoursynth; per instructions it was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables identify the video framework and vspipe CLI; official docs cover video functions, Python reference, plugins, and output.
